title: Charak Pharma is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Charak Pharma is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!
